datasheet.text: At the Start of your Command phase , select two Author of the Codex abilities (see left). Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has those abilities.
datasheet.name: Author of the Codex

datasheet.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.
datasheet.name: Ultramarines Bodyguard

datasheet.text: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase: on a 3+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy models, with 6 wounds remaining.
datasheet.name: Armour of Fate

entries.text: While a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit and you can re-roll Battle-shock and Leadership tests taken for that unit.
entries.label: Primarch of the XIII (Aura)

entries.text: At the start of your Command phase , after you have selected your Oath of Moment target, select a second enemy unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, if your Oath of Moment target is destroyed , that second enemy unit becomes your Oath of Moment target until you select a new one.
entries.label: Master of Battle

entries.text: Once per battle round , one unit from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit within 12" of that model is targeted with a Stratagem . If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.
entries.label: Supreme Strategist

entries.text: At the Start of your Command phase , select two Author of the Codex abilities (see left). Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has those abilities.
entries.name: Author of the Codex

entries.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.
entries.name: Ultramarines Bodyguard

entries.text: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase: on a 3+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy models, with 6 wounds remaining.
entries.name: Armour of Fate

entries.text: If this model is in your army, it must be your Warlord .
